title: Algorithm for Lossless Join Check
description: Algorithm to verify if decomposition of R into R1 and R2 is lossless
explanation: The algorithm checks if the common attributes between decomposed relations form a key for at least one of them, which is the mathematical condition for lossless join.

title: Algorithm to Find Candidate Keys
description: Procedure to find all candidate keys from set of functional dependencies
explanation: This algorithm finds candidate keys by starting with attributes that appear only on LHS and progressively adding attributes until all attributes are covered by the closure.
